title: Euclid preparation. 3D reconstruction of the cosmic web with simulated Euclid Deep spectroscopic samples
comment: 30 pages, 23 figures. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: The ongoing Euclid mission aims to measure spectroscopic redshifts for approximately two million galaxies using the H $α$ line emission detected in near-infrared slitless spectroscopic data from the Euclid Deep Fields (EDFs). These measurements will reach a flux limit of $5\times 10^{-17}\,{\rm erg}\,{\rm cm}^{-2}\,{\rm s}^{-1}$ in the redshift range $0.4<z<1.8$, opening the door to numerous investigations involving galaxy evolution, extending well beyond the mission's core objectives. The achieved H $α$ luminosity depth will lead to a sufficiently high sampling, enabling the reconstruction of the large-scale galaxy environment. We assess the quality of the reconstruction of the galaxy cosmic web environment with the expected spectroscopic dataset in EDFs. The analysis is carried out on the Flagship and GAEA galaxy mock catalogues. The quality of the reconstruction is first evaluated using geometrical and topological statistics measured on the cosmic web, namely the length of filaments, the area of walls, the volume of voids, and its connectivity and multiplicity. We then quantify how accurately gradients in galaxy properties with distance from filaments can be recovered. As expected, the small-scale redshift-space distortions, have a strong impact on filament lengths and connectivity, but can be mitigated by compressing galaxy groups before skeleton extraction. The cosmic web reconstruction is biased when relying solely on H $α$ emitters. This limitation can be mitigated by applying stellar mass weighting during the reconstruction. However, this approach introduces non-trivial biases that need to be accounted for when comparing to theoretical predictions. Redshift uncertainties pose the greatest challenge in recovering the expected dependence of galaxy properties, though the well-established stellar mass transverse gradients towards filaments can still be observed.

AI.tldr: 欧几里得任务将利用近红外无缝光谱数据测量约200万个星系的红移，本文评估了基于这些数据重建宇宙网环境的质量，分析了各种统计指标和星系性质梯度恢复的准确性。
AI.motivation: 欧几里得任务将通过Hα线发射测量大量星系的红移，这些数据可用于重建宇宙大尺度结构（宇宙网），但需要评估重建质量以支持后续的星系演化研究。
AI.method: 使用Flagship和GAEA星系模拟目录，通过几何和拓扑统计（如纤维长度、壁面积、空洞体积、连通性和多重性）评估宇宙网重建质量，并分析星系性质随纤维距离梯度的恢复准确性。
AI.result: 小尺度红移空间畸变对纤维长度和连通性有显著影响，但可通过压缩星系群来缓解；仅依赖Hα发射体重建宇宙网存在偏差，但可通过恒星质量加权来改善；红移不确定性是恢复星系性质依赖性的最大挑战。
AI.conclusion: 欧几里得任务的Hα发射体数据可用于重建宇宙网环境，但需要考虑红移空间畸变、选择偏差和红移不确定性的影响，恒星质量加权可改善重建但会引入需要校正的非平凡偏差。

title: Cosmoglobe DR2. VI. Disentangling hot and cold thermal dust emission with Planck HFI
comment: 19 pages, 20 figures, 3 tables. Data available at https://www.cosmoglobe.uio.no/products/cosmoglobe-dr2.html
summary: We present a four-component high-resolution model of thermal dust emission for microwave and sub-mm frequencies derived from Planck HFI, WHAM and Gaia. The resulting high-resolution model derived here forms the basis for the thermal dust model employed in the Cosmoglobe DR2 reanalysis of COBE-DIRBE. The four dust components are called ``cold dust'', ``hot dust'', ``nearby dust'', and ``Ha correlated dust'', respectively, and trace different physical environments. The spatial distributions of the nearby dust and Ha dust components are defined by the Edenhofer et al. Gaia 3D extinction model and the WHAM survey, respectively, while the hot and cold dust components are fit freely pixel-by-pixel to the Planck HFI data. We use a global parameter grid search coupled to an amplitude map Gibbs sampler to fit this model to Planck HFI data. In agreement with the companion low-resolution analysis, we find that the hot dust component is strongly correlated with the FIRAS Cii map, while the cold dust component is strongly correlated with the HI4PI Hi map. Despite its fewer degrees of freedom per pixel compared to the Planck 2015 legacy dust model, we find that this new model performs competitively in terms of overall residuals, capturing over 98% of the full-sky dust variance for all channels. When fitting a spatially varying 3-parameter MBB model to the new dust model with isotropic SEDs, we find very similar spatial distributions to those of the official Planck analysis, and this new model thus represents an economical decomposition of previously published spatially varying spectral parameter maps. We conclude that this new model represents both a statistically more efficient summary of thermal dust in the microwave and far-infrared regimes and a physically more realistic decomposition of the sky compared to the traditional 3-parameter MBB model. (abridged)

AI.tldr: 开发了一个四组分高分辨率热尘埃发射模型，基于Planck HFI、WHAM和Gaia数据，用于微波和亚毫米波段分析
AI.motivation: 传统三参数修正黑体模型在描述热尘埃发射时存在局限性，需要更物理现实的分解方法来更好地理解不同物理环境中的尘埃成分
AI.method: 使用四组分模型：冷尘埃、热尘埃、附近尘埃和Ha相关尘埃，结合全局参数网格搜索和振幅图吉布斯采样器拟合Planck HFI数据
AI.result: 新模型捕获了超过98%的全天尘埃方差，热尘埃与FIRAS CII图强相关，冷尘埃与HI4PI HI图强相关，性能优于传统模型
AI.conclusion: 新模型在统计上更有效地总结了微波和远红外区域的热尘埃，相比传统三参数MBB模型提供了更物理现实的天空分解

title: Testing the correlation between bending angle and polarization properties of bent radio galaxies
summary: The bending of radio galaxies in galaxy clusters is expected to be caused by interactions with the local environment. The physical processes responsible for jet bending, and their influence on the polarization properties of radio galaxies, remain poorly understood, leading to the question of whether jet properties in bent radio galaxies differ from those in linear radio galaxies. Using a sample of 24 polarized bent radio galaxies, observed with the Karl G. Jansky Very Large Array at 1--2 GHz, we test for correlation of bending angle with polarization parameters measuring Faraday rotation, intrinsic fractional polarization, and Faraday rotation dispersion, used here as a measure of turbulence along the line of sight. We find no statistically significant correlations. At the spatial resolution of our dataset (3--46 kpc, median 18.4 kpc), our results indicate that we are primarily probing larger-scale intracluster medium effects not related to bending angle. The absence of a statistically significant correlation suggests that bent radio galaxies are reliable probes of intracluster magnetic fields, because their intrinsic properties do not appear to introduce systematic biases into measured polarization parameters. We do detect a preference for source magnetic field vectors to align with the direction of jet bending. Finally, we estimate that the POSSUM and SKA surveys will contain $\gtrsim$300 and $\gtrsim$1000 polarized radio galaxies, respectively, providing large future samples with a range of bending angles and similar redshift distribution and number of beams per source as in our sample, enabling our results to be tested with greater statistical power.

AI.tldr: 研究通过24个偏振弯曲射电星系样本，分析弯曲角度与偏振参数的相关性，发现无显著统计关联，表明弯曲射电星系可作为星系团磁场可靠探针。
AI.motivation: 射电星系在星系团中的弯曲现象通常归因于与局部环境的相互作用，但导致射流弯曲的物理过程及其对偏振特性的影响尚不清楚，需要探究弯曲射电星系的射流特性是否与线性射电星系不同。
AI.method: 使用24个偏振弯曲射电星系样本，通过Karl G. Jansky甚大阵列在1-2GHz波段观测，测试弯曲角度与法拉第旋转、本征分数偏振、法拉第旋转弥散（作为视线方向湍流测量）等偏振参数的相关性。
AI.result: 未发现弯曲角度与偏振参数之间存在统计学显著相关性；在3-46kpc（中位数18.4kpc）的空间分辨率下，主要探测到与弯曲角度无关的大尺度星系团内介质效应；检测到源磁场矢量倾向于与射流弯曲方向对齐。
AI.conclusion: 弯曲射电星系是星系团磁场的可靠探针，其本征特性不会对测量的偏振参数引入系统性偏差；未来POSSUM和SKA巡天将提供更大样本，以更强的统计能力验证这些结果。

title: Beyond UV: Rest-frame B-band and Apparent Luminosity Functions of z=5-9 Galaxies
comment: 20 pages, 6 figures, accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: We present new measurements of galaxy luminosity functions (LFs) from JWST/NIRCam imaging over the redshift range z=4.5-9.7, using photometric catalogs from JADES and public extragalactic fields. Our analysis includes rest-frame UV and B-band LFs, as well as apparent LFs in F090W, F115W, F200W, F356W, and F444W. We present the first constraints on the rest-frame B-band LF at z~7-8 and extend existing measurements at z~5 to M(B) = -18 mag. The B-band LFs evolve more strongly with redshift than UV LFs, though both decline more gradually than predicted by simulations at z>5. No single existing simulation reproduces all observed trends, with discrepancies likely driven by assumptions about binary evolution and stellar population synthesis models. The apparent LFs in F356W and F444W show hints of a bright-end excess at all redshifts, extending to fainter magnitudes at higher redshift. While extreme emission line galaxies may partially account for it, the excess may also indicate a population of moderately red, optically bright sources - potentially dusty star-forming galaxies or obscured AGNs. Finally, we find that rest-frame B-band luminosity correlates more tightly with stellar mass than UV, making it a powerful tracer of mass assembly and reinforcing the diagnostic value of rest-frame optical LFs in uncovering the physical processes that drive early galaxy formation.

AI.tldr: JWST/NIRCam观测显示高红移星系光度函数演化特征：B波段比UV波段演化更强，但两者在z>5时都比模拟预测更平缓；F356W和F444W波段显示亮端超量；B波段光度与恒星质量相关性更强，是追踪质量聚集的有效示踪剂。
AI.motivation: 研究早期星系形成过程，通过JWST/NIRCam观测高红移星系的光度函数，特别是首次约束z~7-8的B波段光度函数，比较不同波段演化特征，检验现有星系形成模拟的准确性。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRCam在红移z=4.5-9.7范围内的成像数据，基于JADES和公共河外星系场的测光星表，分析静止系UV和B波段光度函数，以及F090W、F115W、F200W、F356W、F444W波段的表观光度函数。
AI.result: B波段光度函数比UV波段演化更强；两者在z>5时都比模拟预测更平缓；现有模拟无法完全再现观测趋势；F356W和F444W波段显示亮端超量；B波段光度与恒星质量相关性比UV波段更强。
AI.conclusion: 静止系光学光度函数对揭示早期星系形成的物理过程具有重要诊断价值，B波段光度是追踪质量聚集的有效示踪剂，观测与模拟的差异可能源于双星演化和恒星种群合成模型的假设。

title: Breathless BEARS: [O$_{\rm \,III}$] 88$μ$m Emission of Dusty Star-Forming Galaxies at $z = 3-4$
comment: Accepted in MNRAS Letters, 8 pages, 5 figures. Comments warmly welcomed
summary: We present [O$_{\rm \,III}$] 88$μ$m observations towards four ${\it Herschel}$-selected dusty star-forming galaxies (DSFGs; log$_{10}$ $μ$L$_{\rm IR}$/L$_{\odot}$ = 13.5 - 14 at $z = 2.9 - 4$) using the Atacama Compact Array (ACA) in Bands 9 and 10. We detect [O$_{\rm \,III}$] emission in all four targets at >3$σ$, finding line luminosity ratios ($L_{\rm [O_{\rm \,III}]}$ / L$_{\rm IR}$ = 10$^{-4.2}$ to 10$^{-3}$) similar to local spiral galaxies, and an order of magnitude lower when compared with local dwarf galaxies as well as high-redshift Lyman-break galaxies. Using the short-wavelength capabilities of the ACA, these observations bridge the populations of galaxies with [O$_{\rm \,III}$] emission at low redshift from space missions and at high redshift from ground-based studies. The difference in [O$_{\rm \,III}$] emission between these DSFGs and other high-redshift galaxies reflects their more evolved stellar populations (> 10 Myr), larger dust reservoirs (M$_{\rm dust}$ $\sim$ 10$^{9 - 11}$ M$_{\odot}$), metal-rich interstellar medium ($Z \sim 0.5 - 2$ Z$_{\odot}$), and likely weaker ionization radiation fields. Ancillary [C$_{\rm \,II}$] emission on two targets provide $L_{[{\rm O}_{\rm \,III}]} / L_{[{\rm C}_{\rm \,II}]}$ ratios at 0.3 - 0.9, suggesting that ionized gas represents a smaller fraction of the total gas reservoir in DSFGs, consistent with theoretical models of DSFGs as transitional systems between gas-rich, turbulent disks and more evolved, gas-poor galaxies. Expanding samples of DSFGs with [O$_{\rm \,III}$] emission will be key to place this heterogeneous, poorly-understood galactic phase in its astrophysical context.

AI.tldr: 使用ACA观测4个高红移尘埃恒星形成星系，发现其[OIII]88μm发射与本地旋涡星系相似，但比矮星系和高红移星系低一个数量级，反映了更成熟的恒星种群和更丰富的尘埃环境。
AI.motivation: 研究高红移尘埃恒星形成星系(DSFGs)的[OIII]88μm发射特性，填补低红移空间观测和高红移地面研究之间的空白，理解这类过渡性星系系统的物理性质。
AI.method: 使用Atacama Compact Array(ACA)的Band 9和10对4个Herschel选出的高红移尘埃恒星形成星系(z=2.9-4)进行[OIII]88μm观测，部分目标还获得了[CII]发射的辅助数据。
AI.result: 所有4个目标都检测到>3σ的[OIII]发射，线光度比(L[OIII]/LIR = 10^{-4.2}到10^{-3})与本地旋涡星系相似，但比本地矮星系和高红移Lyman-break星系低一个数量级。L[OIII]/L[CII]比值为0.3-0.9。
AI.conclusion: DSFGs的[OIII]发射较弱反映了其更成熟的恒星种群(>10 Myr)、更大的尘埃质量(10^9-11 M⊙)、金属丰富的星际介质(Z~0.5-2 Z⊙)和较弱的电离辐射场。这些星系是富气体湍流盘和贫气体演化星系之间的过渡系统。

title: Late-time acceleration without a vacuum term in ${f(R,L_m)}$ gravity: scaling deSitter dynamics and parameter constraints
summary: We investigate late-time cosmic acceleration in $f(R,L_m)$ gravity driven by nonlinear matter contributions, focusing on the class $f(R,L_m)=R/2+c_1 L_m+c_n L_m^{n}+c_0$ with the explicit choice $L_m=ρ_m$ and an uncoupled radiation sector. We analyze two realizations: (i) Case A: $f(R,L_m)=R/2+βρ_m^{n}+γ$, where $γ$ acts as a vacuum term, and (ii) Case B: $f(R,L_m)=R/2+βρ_m+γρ_m^{n}$, where the nonlinear sector can mimic dark energy without an explicit cosmological constant. For each case, we construct a bounded autonomous system, classify all critical points and their stability, and compute cosmographic diagnostics. The phase-space analysis shows that Case A reproduces the standard radiation$\to$matter$\to$de~Sitter sequence only for $n\gtrsim 4/5$, with acceleration essentially enforced by the vacuum term. In contrast, Case~B admits a qualitatively distinct and phenomenologically appealing branch: for $0<n<1/2$ the system possesses a physical \emph{scaling} de~Sitter future attractor inside the bounded simplex, yielding radiation$\to$matter$\to$acceleration with $q=-1$ and $ω_{\rm eff}=-1$ and without introducing $c_0$. We confront both models with background data (CC, Union3, DESI BAO, plus a BBN prior on $Ω_b h^2$) using nested sampling and perform model comparison via Bayesian evidence and AIC/BIC. The full data combination constrains $n=1.08\pm0.05$ in Case A and $n=0.05\pm0.10$ in Case B (68\% CL), the latter lying within the accelerating window while remaining statistically consistent with $Λ$CDM kinematics at the background level. We also record minimal consistency conditions for stability (tensor no-ghost and luminal propagation) and motivate a dedicated perturbation-level analysis as the next step to test growth and lensing observables.

AI.tldr: 研究f(R,L_m)引力理论中的晚期宇宙加速膨胀，重点关注非线性物质贡献驱动的两个模型，通过相空间分析和观测数据约束模型参数。
AI.motivation: 探索在f(R,L_m)引力框架下，非线性物质贡献是否能够解释宇宙加速膨胀现象，而不需要显式的宇宙学常数，为暗能量问题提供新的理论解释。
AI.method: 采用f(R,L_m)=R/2+c_1L_m+c_nL_m^n+c_0形式的引力理论，具体分析两个模型：Case A（含真空项）和Case B（非线性项模拟暗能量）。通过构建有界自治系统、分析临界点稳定性、计算宇宙学诊断量，并结合背景观测数据进行贝叶斯分析。
AI.result: Case A仅在n≳4/5时能重现标准辐射→物质→de Sitter演化序列，加速主要由真空项驱动；Case B在0<n<1/2时存在物理的缩放de Sitter未来吸引子，无需引入c_0即可实现辐射→物质→加速演化。观测数据约束Case A中n=1.08±0.05，Case B中n=0.05±0.10，后者与ΛCDM运动学在背景水平上统计一致。
AI.conclusion: Case B模型在0<n<1/2参数范围内能够通过非线性物质贡献实现宇宙加速膨胀，无需显式宇宙学常数，且在背景水平上与ΛCDM统计一致，为暗能量问题提供了有前景的理论框架，但需要进一步的扰动水平分析来检验生长和透镜观测。

title: Extracting intrinsic alignments in the Dark Energy Survey's year 1 data, using the self-calibration method and LSST-DESC tools
summary: We present the implementation of a Self-Calibration of Intrinsic Alignments of galaxies as an extension to the Vera C. Rubin Observatory's Legacy Survey of Space and Time (LSST) Dark Energy Science Collaboration (DESC)'s weak lensing 3x2pt pipeline (TXPipe). As a demonstration, we have run this pipeline on the Dark Energy Survey (DES) year one data set. We find indications of a non-zero intrinsic alignment signal in the higher redshift bins, while in the lower bins our results look more uncertain. We believe this is caused by known issues with the individual galaxies photo-z estimation. This effect is particularly harmful for the self-calibration method, since it has high requirements for reliable estimation of the photo-$z$s, and the need for individual galaxy point estimates and tomographic binning to match. We show how different methods of recreating the redshift probability distribution can affect the detection of intrinsic alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文在LSST DESC的弱透镜3x2pt流程中实现了星系固有排列的自校准方法，并在DES一年数据上进行了测试，发现高红移区间存在非零固有排列信号，而低红移区间结果不确定，主要受光测红移估计问题影响。
AI.motivation: 星系固有排列是弱透镜宇宙学测量的重要系统误差源，需要准确校准。本文旨在将固有排列自校准方法集成到LSST DESC的标准弱透镜分析流程中，并在实际观测数据上验证其可行性。
AI.method: 将星系固有排列自校准方法作为扩展模块实现到LSST DESC的TXPipe弱透镜3x2pt分析流程中，使用Dark Energy Survey一年数据进行测试，分析不同红移重建方法对固有排列检测的影响。
AI.result: 在高红移区间检测到非零的固有排列信号，而低红移区间结果不确定。发现光测红移估计的准确性对自校准方法至关重要，特别是单个星系红移点估计与层析分箱的匹配问题会严重影响结果。
AI.conclusion: 固有排列自校准方法在实际观测数据中可行，但高度依赖于可靠的光测红移估计。不同红移概率分布重建方法会显著影响固有排列信号的检测，需要进一步改进红移估计技术以获得更可靠的结果。

title: The BINGO project X. Cosmological parameter constraints from HI Intensity Mapping lognormal simulations
summary:
Building on the transformative success of optical redshift surveys, the emerging technique of neutral hydrogen (HI) intensity mapping (IM) offers a novel probe of large-scale structure (LSS) growth and the late-time accelerated expansion of the universe.
  We present cosmological forecasts for the Baryon Acoustic Oscillations from Integrated Neutral Gas Observations (BINGO), a pioneering HI IM experiment, quantifying its potential to constrain the \textit{Planck}-calibrated $Λ$CDM cosmology and extensions to the $w_0w_a$CDM dark energy model.
  For BINGO's Phase~1 configuration, we simulate the HI IM signal using a lognormal model and incorporate three dominant systematics: foreground residuals, thermal noise, and beam resolution effects. Using Bayesian inference, we derive joint constraints on six cosmological parameters ($Ω_b h^2$, $Ω_c h^2$, $100θ_s$, $n_s$, $\ln 10^{10} A_s$, and $τ_r$) alongside 60 HI parameters ($b_{\rm HI}^i$, $Ω_{\rm HI}^i b_{\rm HI}^i$) across 30 frequency channels.
  Our results demonstrate that combining BINGO with the Planck 2018 CMB dataset tightens the confidence regions of cosmological parameters to $\sim$40\% the size of those from Planck alone, significantly improving the precision of parameter estimation. Furthermore, BINGO constrains the redshift evolution of HI density and delivers competitive measurements of the dark energy equation of state parameters ($w_0$, $w_a$).
  These results demonstrate BINGO's potential to extract significant cosmological information from the HI distribution and provide constraints competitive with current and future cosmological surveys.

AI.tldr: BINGO中性氢强度映射实验通过结合普朗克CMB数据，能将宇宙学参数置信区域缩小至普朗克单独结果的40%，显著提升参数估计精度，并对暗能量状态方程提供竞争性约束。
AI.motivation: 中性氢强度映射作为一种新兴技术，为研究大尺度结构增长和宇宙晚期加速膨胀提供了新途径。BINGO实验旨在利用这种技术来约束ΛCDM宇宙学及其扩展模型。
AI.method: 使用对数正态模型模拟HI强度映射信号，纳入三种主要系统误差（前景残差、热噪声、波束分辨率效应），通过贝叶斯推断联合约束6个宇宙学参数和60个HI参数（跨30个频率通道）。
AI.result: BINGO与普朗克2018 CMB数据集结合后，宇宙学参数置信区域缩小至普朗克单独结果的约40%，显著提升参数估计精度，同时约束了HI密度的红移演化，并对暗能量状态方程参数提供了竞争性测量。
AI.conclusion: BINGO实验具有从HI分布中提取重要宇宙学信息的潜力，其约束能力可与当前和未来的宇宙学巡天相竞争，展示了中性氢强度映射技术的强大应用前景。

recommendation.reason: Zotero 尚未配置，当前仅根据默认兴趣关键词给出 low 置信度排序。
